---
description: Workspace memory for the project mission and generalization direction.
applyTo: "**/*"
---

# Project Memory

Keep SyntheticInsightArchitecture centered on generalized systemic reasoning, not repo-specific analysis.

## Generalized Mission

Treat social, civic, institutional, and operational signals as first-class inputs. Design for interventions, tradeoffs, and predicted outcomes across complex systems rather than for any single repository, codebase, or product domain.

## Evaluation Direction

Prefer generalized and social-signal scenarios, blinded controls, and outcome scoring. Use optional corpora only as temporary examples, never as architectural anchors or default evaluation paths.

## Refactor Preference

When a choice exists, remove corpus-specific adapters, fixtures, caches, prompts, and reports in favor of generic signal loaders, generalized mocks, and domain-neutral scenario builders.

## Skill Factory Direction

For each new scenario, prefer generating a scenario-specific skill bundle that enforces broad background-information collection, explicit reliability filtering, scarcity-aware prioritization, and predicted-outcome review before recommendations are made.
